note: Australian-produced. Grounded in the course's own modules. Founder to review before wiring live.

quizzes.title: CARSI Timber Floor Restoration Practitioner — Knowledge Check

questions.questionText: A timber floor's dry standard is set by…
options: The equilibrium moisture content of unaffected boards of the same species

questions.questionText: Cupping of boards is typically caused by…
options: A moisture gradient — wetter underside than top

questions.questionText: Drying a timber floor too aggressively risks…
In Australian housing, a key subfloor factor is…

options: The extent of damage, moisture readings and species/construction

questions.questionText: Australian timber floors are complicated by…
options: Many species and a standards gap requiring careful assessment
